runTitle: Production Playwright QA - AI selector verification and Server-Timing diagnosis

expertAssessments.rationale: 2026-03-10 KST 프로덕션 재검증에서 dashboard-ai-chat/dashboard-ai-sidebar 6개 Playwright 케이스는 모두 통과했습니다. same-origin browser fetch와 raw curl 모두 X-AI-* 헤더는 확인되지만 Server-Timing 헤더는 실제 HTTP 응답에 존재하지 않았습니다.
expertAssessments.nextAction: Vercel/Next 응답 경로에서 Server-Timing이 제거되는 지점을 확인하고, 필요 시 X-AI-Latency-Ms 중심 정책으로 QA/관측 기준을 표준화

notes: Production Playwright result: dashboard-ai-chat.spec.ts 2/2 PASS, dashboard-ai-sidebar.spec.ts 4/4 PASS.
Browser fetch on production showed x-ai-latency-ms/x-ai-mode/x-ai-source/x-ai-cache-status present, but no server-timing header.
Raw curl with guest session cookies also returned no Server-Timing header for /api/ai/intelligent-monitoring, confirming this is not a browser header visibility artifact.
